old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.2.5","title":"Persist explicit DAO admissions separately","description":"Persist bounded key-based explicit root DAO admissions atomically in separate redundant scope-bound storage before first accepted DAO; provision initializes and open reconciles with high-water.","acceptance_criteria":"Admission survives restart before first DAO; write failure leaves RAM/storage unchanged; high-water keys are admitted and consistency fails closed; no retirement API.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:37:33.778760426Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-20T06:37:33.778760426Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.2.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:37:33.861308693Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}
